items.title: Madras High Court closes DMK’s 2016 case related to conduct of local body polls in Tamil Nadu
items.summary: Justice M. Dhandapani closes the case after taking note that Justice N. Kirubarakan (since retired) had already passed elaborate orders in the matter
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Five patients recover from Ebola in DR Congo and leave hospital
items.summary: The four nurses - three men and a woman - received certificates to celebrate their recoveries.
